message:
fix(fr-command,fr-store): FUNCTION FLUSH/RESTORE error wording matches upstream [bd-frankenredis-ngn0]

Two small FUNCTION subcommand wording divergences:

- FUNCTION FLUSH SYNC EXTRA (and any argv > 3): fr previously
  emitted the generic "ERR wrong number of arguments for
  'function' command"; upstream functions.c::functionsCommand
  emits the FLUSH-specific "ERR unknown subcommand or wrong
  number of arguments for 'FLUSH'. Try FUNCTION HELP.".

- FUNCTION RESTORE on a too-short envelope: fr-store previously
  emitted "ERR Invalid dump data"; upstream cluster.c::
  verifyDumpPayload emits "ERR DUMP payload version or checksum
  are wrong" uniformly for too-short / version-mismatch /
  CRC64-mismatch failures. Aligned the too-short branch.

Updates the fuzz_function_restore_corpus_matches_documented_contract
test seed assertion to the new wording.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
